page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369HB processor running at 3.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

The underlying Intel Xeon processor includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX, AVX-512F, AVX-512_VNNI, and AVX-512_BF16, which enhance vector and deep learning workloads. In performance benchmarks, the instance delivers solid compute capabilities, achieving a stress-ng single-core score of 1573.69 and a multi-core score of 33210.62. Passmark CPU testing yields a score of 31330.51, with the extended instructions test reaching 29132.86. Memory performance is highlighted by a cached read-only small block bandwidth of 1856.24 GB/sec and an uncached large block write bandwidth of 52.56 GB/sec.

With its 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.hfg7.8xlarge offers a balanced resource profile. It demonstrates strong database and web serving capabilities, processing 30.49 million Redis SET operations per second and achieving a static web serving throughput of 21.23 GB/sec. The lack of bundled local storage requires external block storage attachment, representing a tradeoff for storage-heavy workloads. Qualitatively, its dedicated core model and high-frequency Intel processor provide reliable, non-burstable performance, making it a cost-efficient option for medium-to-large database operations, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and general-purpose enterprise workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.8xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server powered by a 3.3 GHz Intel Xeon 8369HB processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage and GPUs, and provides a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark results show balanced performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 33210.62 and a Passmark CPU score of 31330.51. It excels in memory-intensive operations, delivering 1856.24 GB/sec cached read bandwidth and processing 30.49 million Redis SET operations per second. This hardware profile is appropriate for database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.8xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and a 10 Gbps network baseline, optimized for database and general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.8xlarge is a general-purpose server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon platform with balanced memory and high-frequency compute for enterprise database and web serving workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 3.3 GHz Intel Xeon 8369HB processor with 32 dedicated physical cores.
Equipped with 128 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio.
Supports advanced vector extensions including AVX-512F and AVX-512_VNNI.
Delivers 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no bundled local storage.
Optimized for database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded decompression.
